html:
The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has announced that its newly redesigned website, (link unavailable), will be operational on Monday, December 2, 2024.

The website has been revamped to enhance user experience, with a contemporary Web API that operates on (link unavailable) Core 8.

The redesigned website features a new content spectrum that provides a broader range of information regarding the Bank’s mandate.

Additionally, the website is now responsive to mobile devices, making navigation easier across various web browsers and devices.

The CBN expressed gratitude for the public’s feedback, which guided the redesign process. The Bank is committed to continually developing and enhancing the website to facilitate communication.
